target_property: Factory powertrain CG (x,y,z) and dry mass of stock engine/transmission assembly
system_context: ICE removal / EV conversion weight distribution & battery packaging
inference_forbidden_reason: CG and dry mass cannot be safely inferred from exterior geometry or marketing GVWR tables.
engineering_risk: Incorrect post-conversion weight distribution; spring/battery packaging errors; FMVSS load-distribution risk if guessed.

best_source_tiers.source_class: Workshop Manual / OEM mass properties (if published)
best_source_tiers.notes: Do not invent mass-property tables before WSM bytes exist.

best_source_tiers.source_class: Physical scale measurement of decommissioned core
best_source_tiers.notes: Requires physical asset intake protocol; not executed.

honesty_notes: CFGCOMP engine/transmission IDs are placeholders — nodes not instantiated as verified.
Mission E (MISN-000005) remains deferred; this MEPQ is registered only.
